# replay

Replay a recorded session

## Usage

```bash
agent-device replay <path> [--update, -u]
```

## Session Requirement

Creates or manages sessions internally.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--update, -u`: Replay: update selectors and rewrite replay file in place

## Platform Coverage

_Capability checks are not defined for this command in `command-schema.ts`._
